meta.title: Karmic Mirror
meta.description: Not what will happen to you. What you are becoming.

landing.tagline:
“Not what will happen to you.
What you are becoming.”
landing.step1: See your baseline destiny — the path you're on now
landing.step2: Practice one act of kindness each day — guided by ancient wisdom
landing.step3: Watch your karma shift — as you change, your destiny changes
landing.transitionText:
In the space between heartbeats,
a future is already forming.

onboarding.step1Hint: First, we need to know where you started
onboarding.step2Hint: The month shapes your emotional foundation
onboarding.step3Hint: The day carries the rhythm of your life
onboarding.step4Hint: The hour reveals your hidden nature

errors.invalidYear: Please enter a valid birth year (1900-2026)

baseline.title: Your Baseline Destiny
baseline.subtitle: This is the path you are on
baseline.hint: If nothing changes, this is where you are headed
baseline.notFate: This is your baseline. But it is not your fate.
baseline.firstStep: The first step is the only one that matters.

dashboard.todaysPracticeDesc: One act of kindness, guided by ancient wisdom
dashboard.karmaDriftDesc: See how your destiny is shifting
dashboard.shareDesc: Show the world what you are becoming
dashboard.communityDesc: See what others are reflecting on

zone3.title: Body · Speech · Mind
zone3.insightImbalance: This week your '{highest}' scores highest, but '{lowest}' stays below average — good intentions that haven't yet become action.
zone3.insightBalanced: All three channels are well-balanced this week. Keep it up.

practice.reflectionPlaceholder: What happened when you tried this? How did it feel?
practice.triedButFailed: I tried but couldn't do it today
practice.completeMessage: You have taken one step off the path of inertia. The mirror has shifted.
practice.failedMessage: Honesty matters more than success. You showed up — that already counts.
practice.comeBackTomorrow: Come back tomorrow. The practice will be waiting.

drift.subtitle:
Your Destiny
Is Shifting
drift.lessPredictable: ↓ {points} points · You are becoming less predictable
drift.beginPractice: Begin your practice to see your drift.
drift.significantShift: Significant shift — your practice in this area is working

share.selectCard: Select a card above to preview and share
share.shareHint: Your card image will be generated and shared

cardContent.driftSubtitle: I was headed here. I chose another path.
cardContent.wasOnRails: I was on rails. Now I am free.
cardContent.antiSelfSubtitle: The version of me that could have been
cardContent.choseDifferently: I saw this path. I chose differently.
cardContent.rippleSubtitle: My ripples have touched approximately {count} people
cardContent.neverKnow: Some will never know my name. That is the point.
cardContent.percentileSubtitle: I am in the top {pct}% of {total} Karmic Mirror practitioners
cardContent.percentileRank: Rank #{rank} · Not bad for someone who started from zero.

dailyQuestion.q1: Which matters more — having good intentions, or performing good deeds?
dailyQuestion.q2: If a kindness goes entirely unnoticed, does it still count?
dailyQuestion.q3: Is a good act done out of duty as valuable as one done out of love?
dailyQuestion.q4: Can you be angry at someone and still wish them well?
dailyQuestion.q5: If you had to choose — be right, or be kind — which would you pick?
dailyQuestion.q6: Do you owe more kindness to strangers or to yourself?
dailyQuestion.q7: Is forgiveness for the other person, or for you?
dailyQuestion.q8: When you help someone, are you changing their destiny — or yours?
dailyQuestion.q9: Can an unkind truth be more loving than a kind lie?
dailyQuestion.q10: If every thought left a trace in the world, would you think differently?
dailyQuestion.q11: Is it possible to be too selfless?
dailyQuestion.q12: Does suffering make a person kinder, or harder?
dailyQuestion.q13: If no one were watching, who would you be?
dailyQuestion.q14: What is one kindness you received that changed you — but the giver never knew?

assessment.title: Daily Practice Self-Assessment
assessment.subtitle: Body · Speech · Mind — honestly reflect on your day
